          (instHMul.hMul (Real.exp (Real.instNeg.neg g_cosmo)) (Real.exp (Real.instNeg.neg (instHMul.hMul g_eff n)))) 1)

        have re :=
          instHAdd.hAdd
            (instHAdd.hAdd
              (instHAdd.hAdd
                (instHAdd.hAdd
                  (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r1 f.psi_a) f.dtt_psi_r)
                    (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r2 f.psi_a) f.dxx_psi_r))
                  (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r3 f.psi_a) f.dtx_psi_r))
                (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r4 f.psi_a) f.dt_psi_r))
              (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r5 f.psi_a) f.dx_psi_r))
            (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r6 f.psi_a) f.psi_r);
        have im :=
          instHAdd.hAdd
            (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul c.i1 (instHPow.hPow f.psi_a 2))
              (instHMul.hMul c.i2 (instHPow.hPow f.dt_psi_a 2)))
            (instHMul.hMul c.i3 (instHPow.hPow f.dx_psi_a 2));
        { fst := re, snd := im } }

name: SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF

type:
∀ (a b c d e f : Fin 3),
  Eq (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF a b c d e f)
    (ite (And (Eq a 1) (And (Eq b 1) (And (Eq c 1) (Eq d 1))))
      (ite (And (Eq e 0) (Eq f 0)) (instHDiv.hDiv 1 (Real.sqrt 2))
        (ite (And (Eq e 0) (Eq f 2)) (instHDiv.hDiv 1 (Real.sqrt 2))
          (ite (And (Eq e 2) (Eq f 0)) (instHDiv.hDiv 1 (Real.sqrt 2))
            (ite (And (Eq e 2) (Eq f 2)) (Real.instNeg.neg (instHDiv.hDiv 1 (Real.sqrt 2))) 0))))
      (ite (And (Eq a 2) (And (Eq b 1) (And (Eq c 2) (And (Eq d 1) (And (Eq e 1) (Eq f 1)))))) (-1)
        (ite (And (Eq a 1) (And (Eq b 2) (And (Eq c 1) (And (Eq d 2) (And (Eq e 1) (Eq f 1)))))) (-1)
          (ite (And (Eq a 0) (And (Eq e b) (And (GT.gt (SKEFTHawking.su2kFusion 2 b c f) 0) (Eq f d)))) 1
            (ite (And (Eq c 0) (And (Eq e d) (Eq f b))) 1
              (ite (And (Eq b 0) (And (Eq e a) (Eq f c))) 1
                (ite
                  (And (GT.gt (SKEFTHawking.su2kFusion 2 a b e) 0)
                    (And (GT.gt (SKEFTHawking.su2kFusion 2 e c d) 0)
                      (And (GT.gt (SKEFTHawking.su2kFusion 2 b c f) 0) (GT.gt (SKEFTHawking.su2kFusion 2 a f d) 0))))
                  1 0)))))))
name: SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF.eq_1

type: Fin 3 → Fin 3 → Fin 3 → Fin 3 → Fin 3 → Fin 3 → SKEFTHawking.QSqrt2
name: SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q

type:
And (Eq (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q 1 1 1 1 0 0) { a := 0, b := 1 / 2 })
  (And (Eq (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q 1 1 1 1 0 2) { a := 0, b := 1 / 2 })
    (And (Eq (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q 1 1 1 1 2 0) { a := 0, b := 1 / 2 })
      (Eq (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q 1 1 1 1 2 2) { a := 0, b := -1 / 2 })))
name: SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q_hadamard

type:
∀ (a b c d e f g k l : Fin 3),
  Eq
    (instHAdd.hAdd
      (instHAdd.hAdd
        (instHMul.hMul
          (instHMul.hMul (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q a b c g f 0) (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q a 0 d e g k))
          (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q b c d k 0 l))
        (instHMul.hMul
          (instHMul.hMul (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q a b c g f 1) (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q a 1 d e g k))
          (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q b c d k 1 l)))
      (instHMul.hMul
        (instHMul.hMul (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q a b c g f 2) (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q a 2 d e g k))
        (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q b c d k 2 l)))
    (instHMul.hMul (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q f c d e g l) (SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.isingF_Q a b l e f k))
name: SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.ising_pentagon_Q

type:
∀ (a : Fin 3),
  Eq
    (MonoidWithZeroHom.funLike.coe Complex.normSq
      (Complex.exp
        (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul 2 (Complex.ofReal Real.pi)) Complex.I)
          (instHDiv.hDiv (instHMul.hMul a.val.cast (instHAdd.hAdd a.val.cast 2))
            (instHMul.hMul 4 (instHAdd.hAdd 2 2))))))
    1
name: SKEFTHawking.SU2kMTC.ising_twist_unitary

type:
∀ (c : SKEFTHawking.SecondOrderSK.FullSecondOrderCoeffs),
  Eq (SKEFTHawking.SecondOrderSK.fullSecondOrderAction c)
    {
      lagrangian := fun f =>
        have re :=
          instHAdd.hAdd
            (instHAdd.hAdd
              (instHAdd.hAdd
                (instHAdd.hAdd
                  (instHAdd.hAdd
                    (instHAdd.hAdd
                      (instHAdd.hAdd
                        (instHAdd.hAdd
                          (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r1 f.psi_a) f.dtt_psi_r)
                            (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r2 f.psi_a) f.dxx_psi_r))
                          (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r3 f.psi_a) f.dtx_psi_r))
                        (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r4 f.psi_a) f.dt_psi_r))
                      (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r5 f.psi_a) f.dx_psi_r))
                    (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.r6 f.psi_a) f.psi_r))
                  (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.s1 f.psi_a) f.dxxx_psi_r))
                (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.s2 f.psi_a) f.dtxx_psi_r))
              (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.s3 f.psi_a) f.dttx_psi_r))
            (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.s4 f.psi_a) f.dttt_psi_r);
        have im :=
          instHAdd.hAdd
            (instHAdd.hAdd
              (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul c.i1 (instHPow.hPow f.psi_a 2))
                (instHMul.hMul c.i2 (instHPow.hPow f.dt_psi_a 2)))
              (instHMul.hMul c.i3 (instHPow.hPow f.dx_psi_a 2)))
            (instHMul.hMul (instHMul.hMul c.j_tx f.dt_psi_a) f.dx_psi_a);
        { fst := re, snd := im } }
name: SKEFTHawking.SecondOrderSK.fullSecondOrderAction.eq_1

            ((instSizeOfDefault (Real.instLE.le 0 alpha_sq)).sizeOf alpha_sq_nonneg))
          (Real._sizeOf_inst.sizeOf beta_sq))
        ((instSizeOfDefault (Real.instLE.le 0 beta_sq)).sizeOf beta_sq_nonneg))
      ((instSizeOfDefault
            (Eq (instHSub.hSub alpha_sq beta_sq)
              (instHSub.hSub 1 (SKEFTHawking.WKBConnection.decoherenceParam p)))).sizeOf
        unitarity))

type:
∀ (a b c d : Real),
  Eq
      (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHPow.hPow a 2) (instHPow.hPow b 2)) (instHPow.hPow c 2))
        (instHPow.hPow d 2))
      1 →
    And
      (Eq
        (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul a a) (instHMul.hMul b b)) (instHMul.hMul c c))
          (instHMul.hMul d d))
        1)
      (And
        (Eq
          (instHSub.hSub
            (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul a (Real.instNeg.neg b)) (instHMul.hMul b a))
              (instHMul.hMul c (Real.instNeg.neg d)))
            (instHMul.hMul d (Real.instNeg.neg c)))
          0)
        (And
          (Eq
            (instHAdd.hAdd
              (instHAdd.hAdd
                (instHSub.hSub (instHMul.hMul a (Real.instNeg.neg c)) (instHMul.hMul b (Real.instNeg.neg d)))
                (instHMul.hMul c a))
              (instHMul.hMul d (Real.instNeg.neg b)))
            0)
          (Eq
            (instHAdd.hAdd
              (instHSub.hSub
                (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul a (Real.instNeg.neg d)) (instHMul.hMul b (Real.instNeg.neg c)))
                (instHMul.hMul c (Real.instNeg.neg b)))
              (instHMul.hMul d a))
            0)))
name: quaternion_conjugate_inverse

type:
∀ (a b c d : Real),
  And
    (Eq
      (instHSub.hSub (instHSub.hSub (instHSub.hSub (instHMul.hMul 1 a) (instHMul.hMul 0 b)) (instHMul.hMul 0 c))
        (instHMul.hMul 0 d))
      a)
    (And
      (Eq
        (instHSub.hSub (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul 1 b) (instHMul.hMul 0 a)) (instHMul.hMul 0 d))
          (instHMul.hMul 0 c))
        b)
      (And
        (Eq
          (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHSub.hSub (instHMul.hMul 1 c) (instHMul.hMul 0 d)) (instHMul.hMul 0 a))
            (instHMul.hMul 0 b))
          c)
        (Eq
          (instHAdd.hAdd (instHSub.hSub (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul 1 d) (instHMul.hMul 0 c)) (instHMul.hMul 0 b))
            (instHMul.hMul 0 a))
          d)))
name: quaternion_left_identity

type:
∀ (a1 b1 c1 d1 a2 b2 c2 d2 : Real),
  Eq
      (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHPow.hPow a1 2) (instHPow.hPow b1 2)) (instHPow.hPow c1 2))
        (instHPow.hPow d1 2))
      1 →
    Eq
        (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHPow.hPow a2 2) (instHPow.hPow b2 2)) (instHPow.hPow c2 2))
          (instHPow.hPow d2 2))
        1 →
      Eq
        (instHAdd.hAdd
          (instHAdd.hAdd
            (instHAdd.hAdd
              (instHPow.hPow
                (instHSub.hSub
                  (instHSub.hSub (instHSub.hSub (instHMul.hMul a1 a2) (instHMul.hMul b1 b2)) (instHMul.hMul c1 c2))
                  (instHMul.hMul d1 d2))
                2)
              (instHPow.hPow
                (instHSub.hSub
                  (instHAdd.hAdd (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul a1 b2) (instHMul.hMul b1 a2)) (instHMul.hMul c1 d2))
                  (instHMul.hMul d1 c2))
                2))
            (instHPow.hPow
              (instHAdd.hAdd
                (instHAdd.hAdd (instHSub.hSub (instHMul.hMul a1 c2) (instHMul.hMul b1 d2)) (instHMul.hMul c1 a2))
                (instHMul.hMul d1 b2))
              2))
          (instHPow.hPow
            (instHAdd.hAdd
              (instHSub.hSub (instHAdd.hAdd (instHMul.hMul a1 d2) (instHMul.hMul b1 c2)) (instHMul.hMul c1 b2))
              (instHMul.hMul d1 a2))
            2))
        1
name: quaternion_norm_mul
